title: Breeze Soda
description: add Soda Mechanic using wind charge!
body:
# BreezeSoda

![Soda Potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QQOhJddJ/images/0b2de96bfbc4afbaf348e9076a208d13477dfeed.png)

## Summary

This mod is add Soda mechanic with using Wind Charge in potion!

When craft potion with Wind Charge, Decrease Duration but Potion effect will stronger!

Also You can use WindCharge for SplashPotion and Lingering Potion!
